# Loryians

> Minimalist workspace for solo founders and small teams to plan, track, and ship.

## Core Value
Loryians offers a project management layout focused entirely on developer speed and simplicity. It eliminates bloated navigation, configuration overhead, and multi-step setups to optimize workflow flow.

## Key Features
- **Minimalist UI**: Clean, focus-driven workspaces.
- **Effortless Kanban**: Move tasks smoothly and track milestones.
- **Built for Speed**: Blazing fast rendering and shortcuts.

## Main Links
- Homepage & Waitlist: https://loryians.com
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/loryians
- Contact Email: hello@loryians.com
